item.title: 台湾保险业因改革面临数十亿价值缩水
item.description: 台湾最大的人寿保险公司正为账面价值可能遭受数十亿美元的侵蚀做准备，因该行业正转向更严格的会计框架。【原文：Taiwan’s largest life insurers are braced for a multi-billion dollar erosion in book value as the industry transitions to a more rigorous accounting framework.】

item.title: 欧盟考虑采取措施降低电力成本，包括设定天然气价格上限
item.description: 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩表示，欧盟正在探索不同措施以削弱天然气在该地区电力定价中的作用，包括可能对价格设置上限。【原文：The European Union is exploring different measures to weaken the role of gas in setting power prices across the region, including a possible cap on the price, Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said.】

item.title: 全球资金逆转台湾股市外流态势，涌入资金达数十亿美元
item.description: 周三，外国投资者在台湾主要证券交易所买入价值11.7亿美元的台湾股票，终结了自去年11月以来持续时间最长的资金撤离潮。【原文：Foreigners bought $1.17 billion of Taiwanese stocks listed on the island’s main exchange on Wednesday, ending the longest streak of withdrawals since November.】

item.title: 亚洲对冲基金Dymon与Modular在暴跌中守住2026年涨幅
item.description: 包括戴蒙亚洲资本、模块资产管理和阿尔卑斯投资管理有限公司在内的亚洲基金经理旗下对冲基金，即便在伊朗战争引发市场震荡之后，仍成功守住了今年的收益。【原文：Hedge funds of Asia-based managers including Dymon Asia Capital, Modular Asset Management and Alpine Investment Management Ltd. have managed to hold onto this year’s gains, even after the war against Iran sent shockwaves through markets.】

item.title: 莱斯库尔称暂不调整法国经济增长预期
item.description: 法国财政部长罗兰·莱斯库尔表示，尽管伊朗战争爆发后能源价格飙升将拖累经济，但法国仍坚持今年经济增长预期。【原文：France is sticking to its growth forecasts for this year even as the surge in energy prices following the outbreak of the Iran war will weigh on the economy, Finance Minister Roland Lescure said.】

item.title: 瑞银企业家客户押注人工智能将带来丰厚回报
item.description: 瑞银集团的全球企业家客户押注人工智能将在未来五年创造最大机遇，这与那些视其为威胁的行业形成鲜明对比。【原文：UBS Group AG’s global entrepreneur clients are betting artificial intelligence offers the biggest opportunities over the next five years, a contrast to those industries viewing it as a threat.】

item.title: 亚马逊启动创纪录的八期欧元债券发行，为人工智能目标筹资
item.description: 亚马逊公司正以创纪录的八部分债券发行首次进军欧元债券市场，计划筹集约100亿欧元（116亿美元）用于人工智能领域的投资。【原文：Amazon.com Inc. is making its debut in the euro bond market with a record eight-part sale, aiming to raise around €10 billion ($11.6 billion) to pay for investments in artificial intelligence.】

item.title: 肯尼亚考虑斥资17亿美元修建铁路延伸线至前图洛石油田
item.description: 肯尼亚正考虑将一条殖民时期的铁路线延伸至西北部的油田，计划到2030年将原油运往印度洋港口，为此前提出的出口输油管道提供替代方案。【原文：Kenya is weighing plans to extend a colonial-era rail line to its north-western oil fields to ferry crude to an Indian Ocean port by 2030, offering an alternative to a previously proposed pipeline for exports.】

item.title: 伊朗战争冲击供应后，全球竞相保护石油供应链
item.description: 随着关键供应路线霍尔木兹海峡实质性封锁的局面没有结束的迹象，伊朗在该地区持续发动袭击，世界各国政府加紧努力以稳定能源市场。【原文：World governments stepped up efforts to calm energy markets as the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a pivotal supply route, showed no sign of ending and Iran continued attacks across the region.】

item.title: 阿联酋石油合作伙伴被要求从霍尔木兹海峡后方港口提货
item.description: 阿布扎比国家石油公司已要求其陆上石油合作伙伴从杰贝达纳港提取穆尔班原油，该港口位于霍尔木兹海峡后方的波斯湾内。【原文：Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. has asked its onshore oil partners to collect their Murban crude from the port of Jebel Dhanna, which is located inside the Persian Gulf behind the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 伊朗战争正引发前所未有的化肥危机
item.description:
尿素、氨及其他氮肥产品价格持续上涨。

【原文：

Surging prices for urea, ammonia and other nitrogen products.

】

item.title: 零散新闻：伊朗战争引发化肥危机（播客）
item.description: 众所周知，伊朗战争已导致油价飙升。但这场战争同时也推高了各类化学品的成本，包括尿素、氨水等对粮食生产至关重要的氮肥产品。这一切正发生在最糟糕的时机——春季播种季前夕，此时正是化肥需求最旺盛的时期。 虽然农民此前也经历过尿素等化肥现货价格上涨的情况（尤其在2022年），但已有迹象表明，此次危机可能——【原文：We all know that the war with Iran has sent oil prices spiking. But it’s also pushing up the cost of all sorts of chemicals, including fertilizers like urea, ammonia and other nitrogen products that are essential for food production. This is all happening at the worst possible time — just before the spring planting season, when fertilizer is most needed. And while farmers have seen higher spot prices for things like urea before, notably back in 2022, there are already signs that this crisis migh】

item.title: 劳埃德银行集团将启动12亿英镑股票回购计划，因利润攀升
item.description: Legal & General集团计划回购价值12亿英镑（16亿美元）的股份，此前这家英国保险和资产管理公司的利润实现增长。【原文：Legal & General Group Plc is planning to buy back £1.2 billion ($1.6 billion) of its shares as profits at the UK insurer and asset manager climbed.】

item.title: 七国集团表示支持动用战略储备，国际能源署将召开会议
item.description: 七国集团表示，自伊朗战争爆发以来，该集团支持动用战略储备以应对石油供应和市场波动问题。【原文：The Group of Seven economies said it supports the use of strategic reserves to address oil supply and market volatility since the outbreak of the war in Iran.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利交易员力推做空克罗诺斯全球公司债券
item.description: 摩根士丹利的信贷交易部门正力推一项押注，针对的是钛白粉制造商克罗诺斯全球公司发行的债券。该公司在伊朗战争导致能源成本飙升之前就已举步维艰。【原文：Morgan Stanley’s credit trading desk is pitching a bet against bonds issued by Kronos Worldwide Inc, a titanium-dioxide manufacturer that was already struggling before the war in Iran sent energy costs soaring.】

item.title: 沙特矿业公司6700万美元IPO首日大涨 尽管伊朗战争持续
item.description: 沙特阿拉伯矿业公司萨勒赫·阿卜杜勒阿齐兹·拉希德父子公司在利雅得交易所首日交易中股价飙升，尽管伊朗在波斯湾地区持续发动导弹和无人机袭击，且该国与美国及以色列的冲突已进入第十二天。【原文：Saudi Arabian miner Saleh Abdulaziz Al Rashed & Sons Co. surged in its Riyadh trading debut, defying ongoing Iranian missile and drone strikes across the Gulf as the war with the US and Israel entered its twelfth day.】

item.title: Oasis对深陷丑闻的电机制造商日本电产（Nidec）进行股权投资
item.description: Oasis Management Co.已持有日本电机制造商日本电产（Nidec Corp.）的重大股权。该公司因会计丑闻陷入动荡，被迫推迟发布财报，信用评级遭下调，面临被股市除名的风险。【原文：Oasis Management Co. has built a significant stake in Nidec Corp., which is in turmoil following an accounting scandal that forced the Japanese electric-motor maker to delay financial results, see its credit rating downgraded and put it at risk of a delisting from the stock market.】

item.title: 欧洲央行加息可能比预期的更近——卡齐米尔称
item.description: 欧洲央行理事会成员彼得·卡齐米尔表示，伊朗战争及其对通胀的影响可能迫使欧洲央行提前加息。【原文：The Iran war and its impact on inflation risk forcing the European Central Bank to raise interest rates sooner than anticipated, according to Governing Council member Peter Kazimir.】

item.title: 沃尔玛支持的Flipkart据悉计划于4月邀请银行竞标IPO
item.description: 知情人士透露，在线零售商Flipkart Internet Pvt公司最早将于下月启动正式流程，邀请银行竞标其潜在首次公开募股（IPO）相关业务。【原文：Online retailer Flipkart Internet Pvt is set to start the formal process for banks to pitch for work on its potential initial public offering as soon as next month, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 和谐黄金宣布首次铜产量，战略转型之际
item.description: 和谐黄金矿业公司在财年上半年首次生产出铜，该公司正将业务拓展至这种对能源转型至关重要的金属领域。【原文：Harmony Gold Mining Co. produced its first copper during its fiscal first half as the firm expands into the metal that’s key to the energy transition.】

item.title: 莱茵金属2026年展望未达预期
item.description: 德国国防巨头莱茵金属公司公布2026年销售额展望为140亿至145亿欧元（合163亿至169亿美元），这一数字低于分析师预期，正值该公司面临关键时期——欧洲各国军事支出计划正逐步成形。【原文：German defense prime Rheinmetall AG posted a 2026 sales outlook of €14 billion to €14.5 billion ($16.3 billion to $16.9 billion), falling short of analyst expectations at a critical time for the company, as Europe’s military spending plans take shape.】

item.title: 阿达尼能源从阿波罗获得5亿美元双边债务融资
item.description: 据知情人士透露，阿达尼集团旗下某子公司通过私募债券向阿波罗全球管理公司旗下基金募集约5亿美元资金，此举凸显了这家印度综合企业持续寻求美元债券市场之外融资渠道的努力。【原文：A unit of Adani Group raised about $500 million through a bond privately placed with funds managed by Apollo Global Management Inc., according to people familiar with the matter, highlighting the Indian conglomerate’s ongoing effort to tap funding outside the public dollar bond market.】

item.title: 英镑上涨，因油价压力缓解
中东危机之际 韩国将加速重启核电
item.description: 韩国将加快重启正在维护中的核反应堆，以确保在中东持续战争期间的能源供应。【原文：South Korea will speed up the restart of nuclear reactors undergoing maintenance to secure energy amid the ongoing war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 太平洋投资管理公司将私募信贷"清算"归咎于草率承销
item.description: 太平洋投资管理公司表示，私人信贷市场日益加剧的压力源于多年来放贷过程中疏于审查的承保标准。【原文：The rising strain in the private credit market is a result of years of sloppy underwriting standards in lending, according to Pacific Investment Management Co.】

item.title: 泰国石油基金每日耗资3200万美元以限制柴油价格
item.description: 泰国政府正扩大抑制燃油需求的举措，因其在全球能源成本飙升之际，为维持国内柴油价格人为低位而耗费大量资金。【原文：The Thai government is widening efforts to curb demand for fuel, as it bleeds cash fighting to keep domestic diesel prices artificially low amid surging global energy costs.】

item.title: 摩根大通下调私募信贷组合估值，《金融时报》报道
item.description: 据《金融时报》报道，摩根大通公司正限制向私募信贷基金放贷，此前该公司对其投资组合中某些资产进行了减记。这标志着信贷市场中曾经蓬勃发展的领域正面临压力。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. is restricting its lending to private credit funds after marking down the value of certain assets in their portfolios, the Financial Times reported, the latest sign of stress in a once-booming segment of the credit market.】

item.title: 伊朗战争战术从过去冲突的教训中不断演变
item.description:
从无人机集群攻击到导弹发射装置的打击，塑造这场冲突的战略体现了2025年美国、以色列和伊朗积累的实战经验。【原文：

From drone barrages to strikes on missile launchers, the strategies shaping the conflict reflect experience gained by the US, Israel and Iran in 2025.

】

item.title: 中国人民银行采用浮动人民币汇率定价机制应对伊朗战争影响
item.description: 中国央行正释放出对人民币汇率灵活性容忍度提高的信号，这表明其有信心使人民币免受伊朗战争引发的市场动荡影响。【原文：China’s central bank is signaling an increased tolerance for yuan flexibility, a sign of confidence it can insulate the currency from market turmoil triggered by the Iran war.】

item.title: 全球银行反对印度离岸外汇报告计划
item.description: 据知情人士透露，全球贷款机构反对印度央行要求加强离岸卢比交易报告的提案。【原文：Global lenders pushed back against a proposal by India’s central bank for more reporting of offshore rupee trades, according to people familiar with the matter.】
